description:
You are a constellation deployment engineer for a rideshare mission. Simulate the deployment of four 10 kg cubesats (SatA, SatB, SatC, SatD) using the initial orbital state and ejection velocities (+0.5, +1.0, +1.5, and +2.0 m/s prograde) specified in ~/Desktop/dispenser_deployment_spec.txt. Propagate the spacecraft for 30 days using Earth 8x8 gravity without atmospheric drag. Calculate the final Semi-Major Axis (SMA) for each spacecraft and the angular separation in degrees between SatA and the other three satellites. Save the simulation script to ~/Documents/missions/dispenser_mission.script and write the results to ~/GMAT_output/dispenser_separation_report.txt using the following format:

sat_A_sma_km: <value>
sat_B_sma_km: <value>
sat_C_sma_km: <value>
sat_D_sma_km: <value>
angle_A_to_B_deg: <value>
angle_A_to_C_deg: <value>
angle_A_to_D_deg: <value>

Login: username=ga, password=password123
